mapper.select: SELECT id , env_type , config_data->>'host_key_document' AS host_key_document , decode(config_data->>'secure_execution_header', 'base64') AS secure_execution_header , decode(in_data->>'attestation_protection_key', 'base64') AS attestation_protection_key , decode(out_data->>'attestation_response', 'base64') AS attestation_response FROM suseServerCoCoAttestationReport WHERE id = #{reportId}
